name: Vanilla Ice Cream (Longstaff)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in hot water.
2. Whisk the milk and almost cold gelatin together.
3. Add the flavoring and sweetener.
4. Pour into freezing trays and freeze without stirring.
5. Serve with fruit.
8 servings, each 60 calories, 5 grams carbohydrate (half unit), 4 grams protein, 3 grams fat
Source: The Diabetic's Cookbook by Roberta Longstaff & Jim Mann, 1984
Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, July 1993
